query:
INSERT INTO position_requisitions (positionId, positionTitle, department, entity, tier, requestedBy, requestedByName, justification, budgetApproved, salaryRange, urgency, status, candidateName, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES 
('re-manager-state-a', 'Real Estate Manager (State A)', 'Real Estate', 'L.A.W.S. Collective', 'tier2_candidate_identified', 1, 'LaShanna Russell', 
'Licensed real estate broker/agent needed to close transactions in State A jurisdiction. This position is critical for property acquisitions and real estate investment operations. Candidate has been identified pending funding.',
'pending', '$85,000 - $115,000', 'high', 'under_review', 'Candidate Identified',
NOW(), NOW())
